title: [codereview-2] codec.c BUILD_ASSERTs should reference BLE_FRAME_MAX for full coupling
description: codec.c has its own BUILD_ASSERT for MAX_SERIAL_PAYLOAD <= UINT16_MAX. To fully couple with the new LICHEN_MESHCORE_BLE_FRAME_MAX and Kconfig, add BUILD_ASSERT(CONFIG_LICHEN_MESHCORE_MAX_SERIAL_PAYLOAD <= LICHEN_MESHCORE_BLE_FRAME_MAX, "Exceeds MeshCore BLE limit"); P4 consistency across meshcore files. Discovered in second codereview pass.
